_comment: ArmorClaw policy file — defines which roles can call which tools. Evaluated deterministically BEFORE any tool executes. The LLM never sees this file.

rules.description: Junior devs can restart services — safe, reversible operation
Junior devs CANNOT drop databases — they must not touch PHI data
rules.reason: Junior developers do not have permission to drop databases. PHI data access requires Project Manager approval.

rules.description: Senior devs CANNOT drop databases — PHI changes require PM sign-off
rules.reason: PHI data operations require Project Manager approval, even for Senior Developers.

rules.description: Project Managers are authorized to drop databases
No role — including PM — can delete admin accounts. Hard block.
rules.reason: Admin account deletion is never permitted via the AI agent. Use the admin console directly.
